en.name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Kashiwagi B Site
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of excavated artifacts. It is municipally designated in Eniwa City, dated 26 March 1993, and held at the Eniwa City Local Museum.
A tangible cultural property, a lidded Sueki ware cup. It is municipally designated in Eniwa City, dated 26 March 1993, and held at the Eniwa City Local Museum.
A tangible cultural property, a warabite (fern-hilt) sword. It is municipally designated in Eniwa City, dated 26 March 1993, and held at the Eniwa City Local Museum.
A tangible cultural property, a double-headed stone spearhead. It is municipally designated in Eniwa City, dated 16 June 2005, and held at the Eniwa City Local Museum.
A tangible cultural property, a Ryūhei Eihō coin. It is municipally designated in Eniwa City, dated 16 June 2005, and held at the Eniwa City Local Museum.

en.name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Pit Graves of the Karinba Site
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of artifacts excavated from pit graves. It is municipally designated in Eniwa City, dated 17 July 2008, and held at the Eniwa City Local Museum.

en.name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Ring-Shaped Earthwork of the Kashiwagi B Site
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of artifacts excavated from a ring-shaped earthwork. It is municipally designated in Eniwa City, dated 7 May 2013, and held at the Eniwa City Local Museum.

en.name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Pit Graves and Former Riverbed of the Kashiwagigawa 4 Site
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of artifacts excavated from pit graves and a former river channel. It is municipally designated in Eniwa City, dated 7 May 2013, and held at the Eniwa City Local Museum.
